creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: makc
Date: Thu Aug 22 21:42:42 2013
New Revision: 325235
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325235

Log:
  - Update to 1.7.3
  - Remove no longer needed wrapper script
  - Update LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/181381,
  		ports/177991
  Submitted by:	Christoph Moench-Tegeder <cmt at burggraben.net>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (4 months)

Deleted:
  head/astro/qlandkartegt/files/qlandkartegt.in
Modified:
  head/astro/qlandkartegt/Makefile
  head/astro/qlandkartegt/distinfo
  head/astro/qlandkartegt/pkg-plist

Modified: head/astro/qlandkartegt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/astro/qlandkartegt/Makefile	Thu Aug 22 21:38:57 2013	(r325234)
+++ head/astro/qlandkartegt/Makefile	Thu Aug 22 21:42:42 2013	(r325235)
@@ -2,15 +2,14 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	qlandkartegt
-PORTVERSION=	1.5.1
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.3
 CATEGORIES=	astro
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/QLandkarteGT%20${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	i@levsha.me
 COMMENT=	The ultimate outdoor aficionado's tool
 
-LICENSE=	GPLv2
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	gdal:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/gdal \
 		proj:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/proj \
@@ -21,12 +20,6 @@ USE_QT4=	dbus gui opengl network sql xml
 		moc_build uic_build rcc_build qmake_build
 USE_GL=		glu
 
-SUB_FILES=	qlandkartegt
-
 MAN1=		qlandkartegt.1
 
-post-install:
-	${MV} ${PREFIX}/bin/qlandkartegt ${PREFIX}/bin/qlandkartegt.bin
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/qlandkartegt ${PREFIX}/bin
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/astro/qlandkartegt/distinfo	Thu Aug 22 21:38:57 2013	(r325234)
+++ head/astro/qlandkartegt/distinfo	Thu Aug 22 21:42:42 2013	(r325235)

+SIZE (qlandkartegt-1.7.3.tar.gz) = 8334026

 bin/cache2gtiff
 bin/map2gcm

+bin/map2rmp
 bin/qlandkartegt

 share/applications/qlandkartegt.desktop
 share/pixmaps/qlandkartegt.png
 %%DATADIR%%/translations/qlandkartegt_cs.qm
@@ -14,5 +15,5 @@ share/pixmaps/qlandkartegt.png

 %%DATADIR%%/translations/qlandkartegt_ru.qm
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/translations

+@dirrmtry %%DATADIR%%
 @dirrmtry share/applications
